findings.summary: Q1/Q2 CSD17311Q5 MOSFETs completely missing from all nets

incorrect.description: Hidden pins (pins 1,2 marked hide) likely cause wire-to-pin matching failure. Zero net connections for both Q1 and Q2 CSD17311Q5 transistors.

suggestions: Ensure hidden pins are still matched to wires/nets during connectivity analysis

findings.summary: R4/C35 RC filter false positive (pull-up + decoupling caps)

incorrect.description: R4 is PGOOD pull-up, C35/C44 are decoupling caps. Falsely detected as RC filter.

suggestions: Exclude pull-up resistors paired with decoupling caps from RC filter detection

findings.summary: R13/C45 RC filter wrong ground_net (reports VOUT)

incorrect.description: R13/C45 RC filter reports ground_net as VOUT instead of actual ground net.

suggestions: Verify ground_net assignment in RC filter detection logic

incorrect.description: R4 is a pull-up resistor on PGOOD but classified as series resistor.

suggestions: Distinguish pull-up/pull-down resistors from series resistors by checking if one terminal is on a power rail
